Default Prove-Up Hearing.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Pamela Sieux, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Natalia Cassidy, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants.
Defaults entered on April 12, 2005.
Doe defendants dismissed on July 16, 2008.
Defendant Ibrahim Mohammad was dismissed without prejudice on July 16, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Natalia Cassidy, and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $509,765.00.
Punitive Damages - $250,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - To Be Determined.
Attorney's Fees - $31,010.00.
Costs - $4,350.79320.00, for a total of $795,125.79.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a Propose Judgment to the Court for review no later than July 22, 2008.
